name: Moonlit Labradorite Drop
description:
A flash of northern lights, captured in stone and cradled in hand-wrapped copper wire. This pendant features a genuine labradorite cabochon, known for its ethereal blue-green flash, wrapped in antiqued copper wire and suspended from an 18" copper chain with a handmade clasp.

Wear it close to your heart on quiet days. Layer it with longer chains for a gathered, earthy look.
shortDescription: Ethereal labradorite cabochon wrapped in antiqued copper wire.

images.alt: Moonlit Labradorite Drop pendant front view
Moonlit Labradorite Drop pendant side view
Moonlit Labradorite Drop pendant detail of wire wrapping
Moonlit Labradorite Drop pendant worn on model

careInstructions: Remove before swimming or bathing. Store in the provided pouch to prevent tarnishing. Polish gently with a soft cloth.

name: Willow Wrap Ring
description:
Inspired by willow branches bending over still water. This delicate ring is hand-formed from sterling silver wire, wrapped in a flowing organic pattern and finished with a single luminous freshwater pearl.

A piece for the woman who finds beauty in simplicity.
shortDescription: Hand-formed sterling silver wire ring with freshwater pearl.

images.alt: Willow Wrap Ring front view
Willow Wrap Ring side profile
Willow Wrap Ring detail of pearl setting
Willow Wrap Ring worn on hand

careInstructions: Sterling silver may develop a natural patina over time. Polish with a silver cloth to restore brightness. Remove before using lotions or cleaning products.

name: Morning Dew Hoops
description:
Tiny drops of aventurine catching the light like dew on a blade of grass. Hand-formed gold-fill hoops adorned with faceted green aventurine beads. Lightweight and comfortable for all-day wear.

Perfect with a linen blouse, loose hair, and nowhere to rush.
shortDescription: Gold-fill hoops with faceted green aventurine drops.

images.alt: Morning Dew Hoops front view
Morning Dew Hoops side view showing drop
Morning Dew Hoops close-up of aventurine beads
Morning Dew Hoops worn on model

careInstructions: Gold-fill is very durable but should be removed before swimming in chlorinated water. Wipe gently with a soft cloth after wearing.

name: River Stone Cuff
description:
Heavy, grounding, and beautiful — this hand-hammered brass cuff is set with a smooth jasper cabochon that feels like a river stone warmed by the sun. The hammered texture catches light from every angle.

A statement piece that whispers rather than shouts.
shortDescription: Hand-hammered brass cuff with jasper cabochon.

images.alt: River Stone Cuff front view
River Stone Cuff showing hammered texture detail
River Stone Cuff jasper stone close-up
River Stone Cuff worn on wrist

careInstructions: Brass develops a beautiful patina naturally. To maintain a bright finish, polish with a brass cloth. Avoid prolonged contact with water.

name: Fern Frond Pendant
description:
A real pressed fern frond, preserved and set in sterling silver. Each pendant captures a tiny piece of the forest — no two are exactly alike.

Hangs from a delicate 20" sterling silver chain with a spring ring clasp.
shortDescription: Real pressed fern preserved in sterling silver.

images.alt: Fern Frond Pendant front view
Fern Frond Pendant showing fern detail
Fern Frond Pendant back view with hallmark

careInstructions: Handle the resin setting gently. Avoid dropping or exposing to extreme heat. Sterling silver chain can be polished normally.

name: Honeycomb Studs
description:
Sweet and geometric — these hand-stamped gold-fill studs feature a tiny honeycomb pattern. Each hexagon is individually stamped, so every pair has its own subtle character.

Perfect everyday earrings that add a quiet touch of nature to any look.

images.alt: Honeycomb Studs front view
Honeycomb Studs close-up of stamped pattern
Honeycomb Studs worn on ear

careInstructions: Hypoallergenic stainless steel posts. Wipe with a soft cloth after wearing. Store in provided pouch.

name: Twisted Vine Band
description:
Two strands of sterling silver wire, twisted together like creeping vines on a garden wall. Oxidized to reveal the beautiful dark contrast in the grooves, then polished on the high points to catch the light.

Stacks beautifully with other rings or makes a quiet statement on its own.
shortDescription: Twisted sterling silver band with oxidized finish.

images.alt: Twisted Vine Band front view
Twisted Vine Band detail of twist pattern
Twisted Vine Band worn on hand stacked with other rings

careInstructions: The oxidized finish will naturally lighten on high-contact areas, adding to its character. A silver cloth can be used on the raised areas only to maintain contrast.

name: Pebble Stack Bangles
description:
A set of three brass bangles, each adorned with a single smooth beach pebble bead. Inspired by the quiet treasures found along a morning shoreline walk.

Wear all three together for a gentle, musical jingle, or share them with friends.
shortDescription: Set of three brass bangles with beach pebble beads.

images.alt: Pebble Stack Bangles set of three
Pebble Stack Bangles close-up of pebble detail
Pebble Stack Bangles worn stacked on wrist

careInstructions: Brass develops a warm patina over time. Polish with a soft cloth to keep bright, or embrace the natural aging process.

name: Amber Glow Drops
description:
Warm amber resin drops that glow like honey held up to the sun. Each bead is hand-formed and captures tiny air bubbles that make every pair truly one of a kind.

Suspended from hand-formed gold-fill ear wires for a gentle sway that catches the light.
shortDescription: Gold-fill drop earrings with hand-formed amber resin beads.

images.alt: Amber Glow Drops front view
Amber Glow Drops showing light through amber resin
Amber Glow Drops worn showing movement

careInstructions: Amber resin is delicate — avoid dropping or exposing to extreme heat. Remove before sleeping. Store in provided pouch.

name: Moss Agate Ring
description:
Like peering into a tiny terrarium — this moss agate stone holds a miniature landscape of green mineral inclusions frozen in translucent stone. Set in a hand-formed sterling silver bezel with a hammered band.

Each stone is completely unique. The one you receive will be similar in character but distinctly yours.
shortDescription: Sterling silver bezel ring with unique moss agate stone.

images.alt: Moss Agate Ring top view showing stone
Moss Agate Ring side profile showing bezel
Moss Agate Ring detail of moss inclusions in stone
Moss Agate Ring worn on hand

careInstructions: Remove before washing hands. Moss agate is relatively hard but the bezel setting should be treated gently. Polish silver with a soft cloth.

name: Sage Leaf Lariat
description:
An elegant Y-shaped lariat necklace with a hand-carved jade leaf pendant that sways with your movements. The gold-fill chain drapes beautifully and the adjustable length lets you wear it closer or longer.

The jade leaf is carved by a partner artisan and each one has subtly different veining — a conversation piece in every sense.
shortDescription: Gold-fill lariat necklace with hand-carved jade leaf.

images.alt: Sage Leaf Lariat full length view
Sage Leaf Lariat close-up of jade leaf
Sage Leaf Lariat worn showing drape

careInstructions: Gold-fill chain is very durable. The jade leaf should be handled with care — avoid dropping on hard surfaces. Store flat to prevent chain tangling.

name: Meadow Chain Bracelet
description:
A dainty sterling silver chain bracelet dotted with tiny peridot gemstones — like wildflowers scattered across a sunlit meadow. The peridot beads are wire-wrapped at intervals along the chain.

Light, delicate, and meant to be worn every day without a second thought.
shortDescription: Dainty sterling silver chain with peridot gemstone accents.

images.alt: Meadow Chain Bracelet laid flat
Meadow Chain Bracelet close-up of peridot beads
Meadow Chain Bracelet worn on wrist

careInstructions: Sterling silver chain is durable for everyday wear. Rinse with water if exposed to lotions. Polish with a silver cloth as needed.
